headline.title: 面向企业AI代理部署前保障：基于本体论仿真与信任认证
headline.summary: arXiv发布新论文，提出一种基于本体论的仿真与信任认证方法，用于企业AI代理部署前的验证，填补了大模型能力基准测试与生产部署之间的关键差距。
headline.title_en: Toward Pre-Deployment Assurance for Enterprise AI Agents: Ontology-Grounded Simulation and Trust Certification
headline.summary_en: A new arXiv paper proposes ontology-grounded simulation and trust certification for pre-deployment verification of enterprise AI agents, addressing the critical gap between LLM benchmarking and production deployment.
headline.reason: 该研究是当日最高分的前沿AI成果，直接关乎企业AI安全部署，具有重要实践意义。
headline.reason_en: This paper is the highest-scored AI research of the day, directly addressing enterprise AI deployment safety with significant practical implications.
